'''Klaua Jik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] who served as an employee for the [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], she was stationed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] when she grew suspicious on [[Eugene Talmont]]. Talmont considered her to be a threat and sent an Imperial [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to end her. She was shortly [[Death/Legends|perished]] by the spacer and Talmont found himself able to move freely again.<ref name="AED" />
